# Module manifest reference

Authoritative source: `moduleManifestSchema` in
[`packages/shared/src/module.ts`](../../packages/shared/src/module.ts). The same validator
runs during `pnpm gen`.

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `contractVersion` | yes | integer | > 0; ≤ 9007199254740991 | Pinned module/SDK compatibility contract; current platform version is 1. |
| `id` | yes | string | pattern: ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ | Folder name, signal module_id, and storage namespace; must be kebab-case. |
| `name` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 60 chars | Participant-facing module name. |
| `icon` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 40 chars | Lucide icon name in kebab-case, for example radio-tower. |
| `description` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 300 chars | Short participant-facing description of the module. |
| `ui` | no | lazy page import | — | Optional lazy import for the module index page. |
| `pages` | no | array<object> | — | Optional extra pages shown in module sub-navigation; slugs must be unique. |
| `homeStat` | no | object | — | Optional authoritative statistic contributed to the shared home dashboard. |
| `tables` | no | array<string> | items: pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$; max 48 chars | Logical snake_case names of module-owned Postgres tables. |

## `pages` fields

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `slug` | yes | string | pattern: ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ | Kebab-case URL segment under the module. |
| `name` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 40 chars | Sub-navigation label. |
| `icon` | no | string | min 1 chars; max 40 chars | Optional Lucide icon name. |
| `ui` | yes | lazy page import | — | Lazy import for this page component. |

## `homeStat` fields

| Field | Required | Type | Constraints | Description |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `label` | yes | string | min 1 chars; max 40 chars | Label for the module's authoritative shared-home statistic. |
| `signalType` | no | string | min 1 chars; max 100 chars | Optional signal_type filter; omit to count every module signal. |
